atDirectives.name: @tailwind
atDirectives.description: Inlines Tailwind's base, components, utilities, or screens layer at this point in the stylesheet.

atDirectives.name: @apply
atDirectives.description: Inlines existing utility classes into custom CSS rules.

atDirectives.name: @theme
atDirectives.description: Defines design tokens (colors, spacing, radii, fonts, etc.) that Tailwind uses to generate utilities. Use `@theme inline` to keep values as-is instead of wrapping them in `var()`.

atDirectives.name: @custom-variant
atDirectives.description: Declares a custom variant (e.g., `dark`, `hover`) that can be used to scope utilities.

atDirectives.name: @variant
atDirectives.description: Applies a variant's selector to nested CSS rules.

atDirectives.name: @utility
atDirectives.description: Registers a custom utility class with Tailwind.

atDirectives.name: @source
atDirectives.description: Declares a source file or glob that Tailwind should scan for class usage.

atDirectives.name: @screen
atDirectives.description: Applies styles at the given Tailwind breakpoint.
